steps.description: @assertion there's "How can I help you today?" exist.
Click on the text input field labeled "Type a message..." located at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground interface.
Type text into the message input field of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground chat interface: 'get repairs assign Karin'.
Press the "Enter" key to submit text ("get repairs assign Karin") typed in the input field at the bottom of the chat interface in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground application.
@assertion the bot's response contains confirmation of successful retrieval for Karin’s assigned repairs
